Notes: Ashley Rosario scores game-winning basket as time expires ... Goldey-Beacom
extends school record with 8th straight win ... GBC sets school records with
15th CACC victory of season and 8th straight CACC win ... Rosario sets GBC
career record by playing 111th career game ... Chargers' 2nd loss in 3 games.
Game.Officials: Reginald Fowler,  Stephen Rubbinaccio,  Sharvez Brown
